channel.title: Journal on mel-land
channel.description: Recent content in Journal on mel-land

item.title: Day 28
item.description: To-do Dailies [ ] Read Folland for 5 minutes & try problems for 5 minutes [ ] Read Make it Stick for 5 minutes [ ] Read Tao Complex for 5 minutes [ ] Read Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea for 5 minutes [ ] Look at graduate school stuff for 30 minutes

item.title: Day 27
item.description: To-do Dailies [ ] Read Folland for 5 minutes & try problems for 5 minutes [ ] Read Make it Stick for 5 minutes [ ] Read Tao Complex for 5 minutes [ ] Read Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea for 5 minutes [ ] Look at graduate school stuff for 30 minutes Thoughts I should be more realistic about my goals and what I intend to do. It’s good to aim high but if you aim straight up you just hit yourself in the head again.

item.title: Day 26
item.description: To-do Dailies [ ] Read Folland for 5 minutes & try problems for 5 minutes [ ] Read Make it Stick for 5 minutes [ ] Read Category Theory for 5 minutes [ ] Read Grimmett for 5 minutes [ ] Read Tao Complex for 5 minutes [ ] Look at graduate school stuff for 5 minutes Today [X] Hang out with Dilara :) Tomorrow [ ] Write up current Folland solutions (#1, 6, 7) Future & Deadlines [ ] {Sep.

item.title: Day 23
item.description: To-do Dailies [ ] Read 5 pages of Make it Stick + notes [X] Keep trying Folland problems. Try to finish the section. [ ] Look for graduate schools to apply to Today [X] Take car to mechanic [X] Cook spaghetti and meatballs for parents! Tomorrow [X] Set up meeting schedule with Hunter for reading group Future & Deadlines [ ] {?} Check out requirements w.r.t GREs for aforemtioned schools [ ] {Sep.

item.title: Day 22
item.description: To-do Dailies [ ] Read 5 pages of Make it Stick + notes [X] Keep trying Folland problems. Try to finish the section. [ ] Look for graduate schools to apply to One-offs [ ] Set up meeting schedule with Hunter for reading group Future & Deadlines [ ] {?} Check out requirements w.r.t GREs for aforemtioned schools [ ] {Sep. 2023} Apply for Masters Programs

item.title: Day 21
item.description: To-do Today [ ] Read 5 pages of Make it Stick + notes [X] Keep trying Folland problems. Try to finish the section. [X] Put up Week 2 on weekly weather reports! I had the photos but was busy with finals… Tomorrow [ ] Read 5 pages of Make it Stick + notes [ ] Keep reading and doing Folland [ ] Set up meeting schedule with Hunter for reading group [ ] Look for graduate schools to apply to [ ] Check out requirements w.

item.title: Day 20

[ ] Put up Week 2 on weekly weather reports! I had the photos but was busy with finals… Tomorrow [ ] Read 5 pages of Make it Stick + notes [ ] Keep reading and doing Folland [ ] Set up meeting schedule with Hunter for reading group

item.title: Day 19
item.description: To-do Today [X] Read 5 pages of Make it Stick and take notes! [X] Finish at least one section of Folland. [X] Think about what to read/take notes on Future & Deadlines [X] Send honors counseling a message about the incomplete [ ] Look for graduate schools to apply to [ ] Check out requirements w.r.t GREs for aforemtioned schools [ ] {Tue, Jun. 20 @ 9:00 AM} Enroll in classes!

item.title: Day 18
item.description: To-do Today [X] Drive home! [X] Just enjoy your day back home. :) Future & Deadlines [ ] Send honors counseling a message about the incomplete Thoughts So happy to be back home. Things to think about I can do it. I can. I have to make that stick!

item.title: Day 17
item.description: To-do Today [X] Finish moving stuff into new apartment [X] Do some chores before leaving [X] Get ready to leave at 6:00 AM! Thoughts Home!

item.title: Day 16
item.description: To-do Today [X] {@ 11:59PM} Galois Theory #31-40 [X] {@ 11:59PM} Galois Theory #41-50 [X] {@ 11:59PM} Galois Theory #Extra 10 Thoughts The quarter is finally over. I am so excited for summer!

item.description: To-do Today [X] Study for Galois Theory [ ] Do Complex Analysis homework [ ] Resubmit Differential Forms homework 2 [ ] Resubmit Differential Forms homework 3 Future & Deadlines [ ] <Jun. 7> Complex Analysis homework due

item.title: Day 3
item.description: To-do Today [X] Study for Galois Theory [ ] Prep for Complex Analyis midterm on Monday! [X] Go to friend’s play (Great week to be a Jacob fan!) Future & Deadlines [ ] <Jun. 4> Do Complex Analysis homework [ ] <Jun. 4> Resubmit Differential Forms homework 2 [ ] <Jun. 4> Resubmit Differential Forms homework 3 [ ] <Jun. 7> Complex Analysis homework due

item.title: Day 2
item.description: To-do Today [ ] Study for Galois Theory [X] Get swiffer, brita, kettle, etc. for apartment Future (by date) [ ] <Jun. 3> Prep for Complex Analyis midterm on Monday! [ ] <Jun. 4> Do Complex Analysis homework [ ] <Jun. 4> Resubmit Differential Forms homework 2 [ ] <Jun. 4> Resubmit Differential Forms homework 3 [ ] <Jun. 7> Complex Analysis homework due Thoughts Today was also very overwhelming. I don’t know if I can do it, but I know I have to at least try, so I’m going to keep trying.

item.title: Day 1
item.description: To-do [x] Exterminator appointment [X] Study for Galois Theory [ ] Look at Complex Analysis homework [ ] Look into resubmitting Differential Forms homework [X] Study for Farsi quiz tomorrow - Past/Present subjunctive, imperative, past/present perfect, and past progressive tenses. Thoughts I’ve been feeling a bit overwhelmed with how this quarter has gone, but it’ll be okay. I don’t know what precisely will happen but I will not let whatever does happen overwhelm me further.
